reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
곧 생일이라 고깔모자 구매했는데 넘 잘 산 것 같아요 !! ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
바스락거리고, 삑삑이도 들어있는데다가 노즈워크도 되고 파티모자로도 씌울 수 있어요!! 머리가 작은데 사이즈도 딱 좋고 고정도 잘되어요 !!
reviews.content_en: Got this party hat for my pup's birthday coming up, and I'm so glad I did!! ㅋㅋㅋㅋ It crinkles, has a squeaker inside, works great for nose work games, and can even be used as a party hat!! My dog has a small head and the size fits perfectly with a secure fit!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너~~무귀여워요ㅠㅠ
노즈워크하기도편하고
모자로잠시씌우니 졸귀네요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute!! 😭😭 It's easy to use for nose work games, and when I put the hat on him for a bit, he looks adorable ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 뜯자마자 좋아해요 깊이가 있어서 넣어쥬면 금방 빼먹지못해서 잘갖고놀아요
reviews.content_en: He loves it right out of the box! It has good depth so when I put treats in, he can't get them out easily and keeps playing with it for a long time

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
고깔모자 좋은데요 ㅎㅎ
색상도 쨍해서 예쁘구요
 여러번 재활용가능해서 가격대비 굿입니다
reviews.content_en: The party hat is great ㅎㅎ The colors are really vibrant and pretty, and since you can reuse it multiple times, it's great value for the price!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
너무 귀엽슴다ㅠㅠ
노즈워크에 바스락에 삑삑이에 로프에 파티용품에 장난감 끝판왕인거 같아요
물론 강아지도 너무 좋아해요🥳
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute!! 😭😭 It's like the ultimate toy with nose work, crinkle sounds, a squeaker, rope, party supplies, and toys all in one! Of course my pup loves it too!! 🥳

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워요! 생일때 해줘도 좋을 것 같고 여기에 간식을 넣어서 노즈워크 하기도 좋은 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! I think it would be perfect for a birthday party, and it's also great for nose work games by putting treats inside!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 장난감들이 다 특성이 있고 개성넘쳐서 좋아요. 저희 강아지가 너무 좋아하고 잘 물어뜯고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: Each toy has its own special characteristics and personality, which is awesome. My pup loves it so much and loves to chew and play with it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바스락거리고 끈이 달려서 강아지 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It crinkles and has a string attached, so my dog plays with it really well

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 악세사리도 되고 장난감도 되고 1석2조!!!
reviews.content_en: It doubles as an accessory and a toy at the same time!!! Two birds with one stone!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요. 생일파티에 썼어요. ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute. I used it for a birthday party. ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 11월에 둘째 생일인데 씌워줄 생각에 벌써 너무 설렙니다. 우리집 아이들 셋 모자도 셋 정말 너무 귀여울거 같아 신나요.
reviews.content_en: Our second baby's birthday is in November and I'm already so excited thinking about putting this on them! 😍 I have three kids at home and three hats - they're all going to look so cute, I'm thrilled!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 아주 아주 아주 좋아해요... 다만 머리에 쓰지는 않습니다.... 겨우 한컷 찍어봤습니다. 터그로만 사용합니다.
reviews.content_en: I love it so much... but my pup doesn't actually wear it on their head... we only managed to get one photo. We just use it as a tug toy.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 고깔모자에 미니트릿을 넣어 주면 노즈워크를 하면서 한참 가지고 놀아요. 장난감도 되고 노즈워크도 되어서 1석2조로 사용할 수 있어요.
reviews.content_en: When I put mini treats in the cone hat, my pup plays with it for a while doing nose work. It's both a toy and a nose work game, so I can use it for two purposes at once!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 작년 펫페어에서 산 걸 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 이번에 또 구매했어요!! 귀엽고 바스락 소리도 잘 나고😛
reviews.content_en: My pup had so much fun with the one I bought at the pet fair last year that I bought it again!! It's cute and makes a great crinkly sound 😛

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
바스락바스락  소리도 나고 삐빅이도 되고 잘가지고 놀아요
끈은 벌써 떨어졌어요ㅋ
reviews.content_en:
It makes a crinkly sound and squeaks and they love playing with it
But the string already came off lol

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 귀엽습니다! 선물용으로 샀어요 장난감 머리띠 둘다가능해서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's adorable! I bought it as a gift. I love that it works both as a toy and a headband!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
곧 생일이라 고깔모자로 쓰려고 샀는데 장난감으로도 잘 가지고 놀아요
간식 안 넣어줘도 혼자 잘 놀아요
reviews.content_en:
I bought it to wear as a cone hat for their birthday coming up soon, but they also love playing with it as a toy
They play with it on their own even without treats inside

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 생일때 하고 찍으면 좋아요 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's great for birthday photos! So cute 🥰

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 퀄리팅 대박! 으마으마하게 귀엽습니다! 다음 생일을 위해 미리 구매!
reviews.content_en: The quality is amazing! Incredibly adorable in a lovable way! Buying it early for the next birthday!

reviews.name: 국****
reviews.content: 바스락 거리는걸 좋으해서 삿아오!!
reviews.content_en: I got it because my pup loves the crinkly sound!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 요즘 미세먼지가 너무 심해서 산책을 못하는 날이 많아 노즈워크 해주려고 구입했어요 집에도 이미 넘쳐나게 많지만 새로운 재미을 느끼길 바래봅니다
reviews.content_en: Lately there are so many days when we can't go for walks because of the fine dust, so I bought this for nose work activities. We already have tons of toys at home, but I'm hoping my pup will find new fun in this! 😊

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
올해 크리스마스선물은 바잇미로 도배합니닥 ㅋ ㅋ
어쩜 개엄마맘에도 쏙 들구 
애기도 잘 가져노니 일석이조 ㅋ ㅋ
앞으로도 장난감은 바잇미🫰🏻
reviews.content_en: I went all out and got BITE ME products for Christmas gifts this year ㅋ ㅋ Honestly, even I (the dog mom) love them so much, and my pup carries them around well too—it's a win-win! ㅋ ㅋ From now on, toys are all about BITE ME 🫰🏻

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 워낙 좋아해서 여러개 구비해서 다양하게 놀게 해줘요
바스락거리고 괜찮아요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves nose work toys so much that I got several different ones so she can play with variety. The crinkly sound is great and she enjoys it!

reviews.name: 숙****
reviews.content: 넘기여워요 가지구놀기도 조을거같아요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! I think it'll be great for carrying around and playing with too 😊

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 친구 강아지 생일파티 초대받아서 주문했어요~! 넘 귀엽고 파티에도 딱이네요!
reviews.content_en: I got invited to my friend's dog's birthday party, so I ordered this! It's so adorable and perfect for the party! 🎉

reviews.name: 비****
reviews.content: 생일날 아주 유용하게 잘 썼습니다. 좋은 상품엔 추천 하나 드려보아요.
reviews.content_en: We used it really well on her birthday. It's such a great product, I'd definitely recommend it.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 울 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: My pup loves carrying this around and playing with it!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 바스락 놀이도 하고, 곧 있을 생일에 쓰려고 샀어요~ 너무 귀여워용
reviews.content_en: She plays with the crinkly sounds and I got it for her upcoming birthday too! It's just so cute~ 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무너무 귀여워서 생일날 모자쓰고 이쁘게
사진찍엇어요
reviews.content_en: It's so so adorable that I put a little birthday hat on her and took the cutest photos! 📸
